titles.title: There Is a Life for a Look

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2 v6 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There is life for a look at the Crucified One, There is life at this moment for thee; Then look, sinner, look unto Him and be saved, Unto Him who was nailed to the tree.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Look! look and live! There Is life for a look at the crucified One, There Is life at this moment for thee.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It is not thy tears of repentance nor prayers, But the blood that atones for the soul; On Him then believe, and a pardon receive, For His blood now can make thee quite whole.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We are healed by His stripes; wouldst thou add to the word? And He is our righteousness made; The best robe of heaven He bids thee to wear, Oh, couldst thou be better arrayed?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Then doubt not thy welcome, since God has declared, There remaineth no more to be done; That once in the end of the world He appeared, And completed the work He’d begun.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: But take, with rejoicing, from Jesus at once, The life everlasting He gives; And know with assurance thou never canst die, Since Jesus thy righteousness lives.
